case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. LUIS ENRIQUE MORENO PALACIOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-28-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BERNICE MEDINA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS ENRIQUE MORENO PALACIOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENVELD; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00 - SERVED DEC-29-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PALACIOS, LUIS ENRIQUE MORENO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARRI SARRIA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS ENRIQUE MORENO PALACIOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALACIOS, LUIS ENRIQUE MORENO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
